creator: sk-ports@vegamuse.org
text:
This is an update to the wmmon-1.0b2 port.  It doesn't use the
	patch file available at windowmaker.mezaway.org, since that
	site hasn't updated with my new patch file (I created the original
	patch file), so I patch all the appropriate files myself in the
	port.

	This update should fix the root-exploit problems (wmmon only needs
	setgid kmem, anyway, so that's what this does).
	This update also fixes the swap usage monitor on FreeBSD 4.0-CURRENT
